---
title: "Pioneers and Founders"
sort_title: "Pioneers and Founders"
year: 1871
subtitle: "1871"
slug: "pioneers and founders"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
---


*1871*



###   
**Online text of**Pioneers and Founders****

[Click here to reach an online version of Pioneers and Founders****from the Internet Archive](https://archive.org/details/pioneersandfound00yonguoft/page/n5/mode/2up)
